card.text_raw_chs:

card.text_upgraded_chs:
造成5点伤害。
本场战斗中所有爪击卡牌的伤害增加4点。
card.text_raw_eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Increase the damage of ALL Claw cards by {Increase:diff()} this combat.
